Title: Post-Uninstallation Data Removal
Preconditions: Application has been installed and used.
Test Steps:
1. Perform uninstallation of the application.
2. Verify that the device no longer contains any data related to the application.
Expected Result: Device should not contain any data related to the application after uninstallation.

Title: Secure Communication with APIs
Preconditions: Application is connected to an API.
Test Steps:
1. Simulate an error condition during communication with the API.
2. Observe how the system handles the error.
Expected Result: System should manage the communication securely, preventing crashes through exception handling.

Preconditions: Application is accessible on multiple devices.
Test Steps:

2. Navigate through the application's interface.
Expected Result: Interface should be navigable without errors on at least three different devices.

Title: Quick User Interaction Response
Preconditions: Application is running and user interactions are initiated.
Test Steps:

2. Measure the time taken for the application to respond.
Expected Result: Application should quickly handle any user interaction and provide a response in short times.

Preconditions: Application is receiving multiple requests simultaneously.
Test Steps:

2. Monitor the system's response to these requests.
Expected Result: System should manage at least two simultaneous requests without blocking or data loss.
